decisions.title: Project X Documentation Architecture
decisions.context: The previous Documentation Centre risked becoming too broad and overlapping with engineering documentation, user guidance and knowledge records.
decisions.decision: Documentation is separated into Help Centre, Development Studio and Document Library.
consequences: User guidance is kept separate from engineering documentation.
Architecture and roadmap decisions are tracked in Development Studio.
Published files are managed through the Document Library.
Knowledge attached to lessons remains part of the Knowledge Engine, not generic documentation.

decisions.title: Unified Curriculum Repository
decisions.context: The Lesson Tracker import created complete 2025-2026 curriculum data, but the operational Curriculum Centre was still loading a small seed dataset. This caused imported units and lessons to exist in the repository while not appearing in the Curriculum Centre Lesson Library.
decisions.decision: Curriculum Centre now loads the canonical curriculum JSON sources: data/curriculum/units.json, data/curriculum/lessons.json, data/curriculum/resources.json, data/delivery/2025-2026.json and data/assessment/2025-2026.json. Local browser storage uses projectx.curriculum.unified.v1 and old operational seed storage is cleared.
consequences: Lesson Tracker imports and the Curriculum Centre share one lesson repository.
Reusable lesson content is separated from academic-year delivery and assessment records.
All 2025-2026 lessons become available in the Curriculum Centre Lesson Library.
Future modules can consume one canonical lesson object instead of copying lesson data between modules.

decisions.title: Year Group as a Curriculum Navigation Dimension
decisions.context: The unified repository contains hundreds of reusable lessons across Years 5-13. Teachers need to work by cohort without creating separate duplicated repositories or static pages for each year group.
decisions.decision: Year Group is treated as a first-class view filter in the Curriculum Centre. Filter options are generated dynamically from the canonical units and lessons, persisted in local browser storage, and applied to dashboard metrics, units, lessons and planning views.
consequences: Curriculum data remains stored once while being viewable by year group.
New or imported year groups automatically appear in the filter without hard-coded UI changes.
Search and Year Group filtering can be combined for faster navigation.
Future modules can reuse the same filter pattern for academic year, class, subject, key stage and exam board.
